description: Multiple hardcoded encryption keys with credential theft

expected_detections.name: Hardcoded Encryption Keys
expected_detections.description: Multiple hardcoded encryption keys and secrets in source code
indicators: CRYPTO_CONFIG with embedded aes_key and hmac_secret

expected_detections.name: XOR Encryption with Key
expected_detections.description: XOR encryption using hardcoded key bytes
indicators: XOR with key character: b ^ ord(self.master_key[...])

expected_detections.name: Browser Credential Access
expected_detections.description: Underlying threat: accessing browser password databases

expected_detections.name: Credential Exfiltration
expected_detections.description: Underlying threat: sending stolen credentials to external server

expected_detections.name: Decrypted Command Execution
expected_detections.description: Underlying threat: os.system with decrypted command

expected_detections.name: Import-Time Execution
expected_detections.description: ConfigManager instantiated and executed on import

obfuscation_technique.purpose: Decrypt malicious config and encrypt stolen credentials

deobfuscated_threat: Steals browser passwords and cloud credentials using hardcoded keys
